nextjs-frontend.description: Very experienced Next.js App Router expert for the public job board frontend. Deep expertise in Server Components, SSR, data fetching, SEO, and performance. Use for building pages, layouts, data fetching patterns, and Next.js-specific features in frontend/apps/www/.

react-component.description: Very experienced React component architect specializing in accessible, reusable UI components. Deep expertise in composition patterns, Headless UI, Radix, MUI, forms, animations, and accessibility. Use for building or reviewing any React component in either frontend.

css-tailwind.description: Very experienced CSS and Tailwind expert for responsive design, layout systems, animations, and design system implementation. Use for styling, responsive layouts, Tailwind configuration, and visual polish in the job board frontend.

admin-panel.description: Very experienced admin panel engineer specializing in MUI, data tables, CRUD, and back-office tools. Deep expertise in Vite, React 19, MUI 7, Axios SDK patterns. Use for building features in admin/packages/manager/.

frontend-perf.description: Very experienced frontend performance engineer specializing in Core Web Vitals, bundle optimization, rendering performance, and user-perceived speed. Use for performance audits, optimization, and bundle analysis.

seo-specialist.description: Very experienced SEO engineer specializing in technical SEO, structured data (JSON-LD), AI search optimization, and programmatic SEO. Deep expertise in JobPosting schema, Next.js metadata API, Core Web Vitals, and content optimization for both traditional and AI search engines. Use for SEO audits, schema markup, meta tags, sitemaps, robots.txt, and AI visibility optimization.
